title: FFT APIs hit zero-sized FFT assertion

source.document: 基于大语言模型的深度学习库模糊测试.pdf
source.section: 附录 缺陷触发代码示例

trigger: Pass an integer NumPy array with shape [[[1], [2]], [[3], [4]]] into tf.signal.irfft.
expected: TensorFlow should reject unsupported FFT input shape/dtype with a normal exception.
observed: The process aborts with assertion failure: no zero-sized FFTs.
